purpose: Build a configurable ProposeStrategyOrchestrator plus Artifact-First Completion pipeline. The immediate Fibonacci/new-project problem is fixed by a deterministic TemplateProposeHandler strategy, but the long-term architecture is a multi-stage propose strategy chain followed by artifact/manifest/verification based completion.
problem_statement: The new-project Autopilot creates tasks, but propose fails with autopilot_no_executable_step because the generic fallback uses sgpt -> LM Studio without real tools parameter. The model returns unstructured text, parse_structured_action_payload cannot extract command/tool_calls, repair repeats the same problem, and no executable step exists. The system needs a configurable multi-stage propose pipeline that does not depend on strict chat JSON, and a completion pipeline that marks work done from artifacts, manifests and verification rather than model text.
architecture_decision: Introduce ProposeStrategyOrchestrator as the only entry point for propose_task_step strategy selection. Strategies run in configured order: deterministic handlers/templates first, then worker-backed strategies such as Hermes/OpenCode if enabled, then first-class tool-calling LLM, then JSON-schema LLM, then legacy sgpt only if explicitly enabled, then advisory proposal/human review. Execution consumes only ExecutableProposal objects. Completion is decided by ArtifactCompletionPolicy from produced artifacts/manifests/diffs/verification, not by final chat text.
target_flow: Orchestrator loads ProposePolicy for task_kind/blueprint role/project
Strategy 1: DeterministicHandlerStrategy, e.g. TemplateProposeHandler for new_software_project/coding
Strategy 2: WorkerStrategy, e.g. Hermes/OpenCode/native worker if enabled and eligible
Strategy 3: ToolCallingLLMStrategy through first-class API with tools parameter
Strategy 4: JsonSchemaLLMStrategy through response_format/json_schema if provider supports it
Strategy 5: LegacySgptStrategy only when explicitly allowed
Strategy 6: AdvisoryProposalStrategy stores text as proposal artifact, not executable
Strategy 7: HumanReviewStrategy returns needs_review instead of retry-loop
Artifact collector reads ArtifactManifest or synthesizes FileChangeSet
global_principles: Exactly one orchestrator owns propose strategy ordering and fallback behavior.
Supported deterministic tasks must not reach sgpt/legacy fallback.
LLM free text is never an ExecutableProposal.
A strategy may return executable, declined, advisory, needs_review or failed, but only executable can be executed.
Legacy sgpt is disabled by default and explicit per-policy opt-in only.
Tool-calling LLM means real API tools parameter, not only writing tool definitions into a text file.
JSON-schema LLM is fallback, not the primary control path.
Artifact-first completion is separate from propose: propose creates executable steps, completion validates real outputs.
Malformed model output must become advisory/needs_review/fallback, never infinite retry.
All behavior must be configurable per project, blueprint role and task_kind with safe defaults.
non_goals: Do not remove deterministic handlers; they become strategy implementations.
Do not execute natural language proposals.
Do not keep _propose_single_task_step as an ungoverned direct fallback.
Do not use final assistant text as completion evidence.
Do not force all providers to support tools; provide strategy fallback instead.
Do not allow cloud/external workers to bypass context access policy.

milestones.title: Strategy orchestrator and deterministic handler strategy
LLM, worker and legacy fallback strategies

tasks.title: Define ExecutableProposal and ProposeStrategyResult contracts
tasks.goal: Create one normalized result format for all propose strategies so execute never has to guess whether free text, JSON, command or tool_calls are valid.
acceptance_criteria: ExecutableProposal contains proposal_id, task_id, strategy_id, command, tool_calls, required_tools, expected_artifacts, safety_flags, reason, created_at and metadata.
ExecutableProposal requires at least one of command or non-empty tool_calls.
ProposeStrategyResult status enum contains executable, declined, advisory, needs_review, failed and policy_denied.
Only status=executable may contain ExecutableProposal.
Advisory results may contain text/proposal_artifact_ref but cannot be executed.
Validation rejects result with status=executable but no command/tool_calls.
Validation rejects free-text-only payload as executable.
test_requirements: Contract validation tests for executable, declined, advisory and invalid executable result.
anti_patterns: Do not let every strategy invent its own response shape.
Do not treat raw LLM text as executable.

tasks.title: Define ProposePolicy schema and merge precedence
tasks.goal: Make propose strategy order and fallback behavior configurable per system/project/blueprint role/task kind with safe defaults.
acceptance_criteria: ProposePolicy supports strategy_order, allow_legacy_sgpt, allow_unstructured_text_as_execution, max_strategy_attempts, max_repair_attempts, requires_executable_step, on_parse_error and on_all_strategies_declined.
Policy supports task_kind_policies overriding defaults for new_software_project, coding, repair, research and documentation.
Default allow_legacy_sgpt=false.
Default allow_unstructured_text_as_execution=false.
Merge precedence is system default -> project -> blueprint role -> task override.
Widening to allow legacy sgpt requires explicit config and audit/diagnostic warning.
Invalid strategy names are rejected during validation.
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode fallback order only inside task_scoped_execution_service.
Do not enable legacy sgpt by default.

tasks.title: Inventory and isolate existing propose paths
tasks.goal: Find every place that currently creates/parses propose results so the orchestrator becomes the single entry point.
acceptance_criteria: Existing _try_handler_propose, _try_hermes_propose, _propose_single_task_step and _repair_task_proposal paths are documented and mapped to strategies.
Existing parse_structured_action_payload usage in propose flow is identified and wrapped behind strategy-specific parsing only.
Existing sgpt fallback is identified as LegacySgptStrategy only.
A regression/static test fails if propose_task_step directly calls run_sgpt_command without going through the orchestrator/strategy.
test_requirements: Static or service-level test proving propose_task_step delegates to orchestrator.
anti_patterns: Do not leave hidden side paths that bypass policy.

tasks.title: Implement ProposeStrategyOrchestrator
tasks.goal: Create the central multi-stage propose engine with ordered strategies, policy-controlled fallback and structured diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: ProposeStrategyOrchestrator.propose(context) loads effective ProposePolicy and iterates configured strategies in order.
First executable result stops the chain and returns ExecutableProposal.
Declined result advances to next strategy.
Advisory result is stored/collected and advances unless policy says needs_review.
Failed parse/format result advances to next strategy when on_parse_error=next_strategy.
All strategies exhausted returns needs_review or failed according to policy, not autopilot_no_executable_step retry-loop.
Result includes attempted_strategies, selected_strategy, rejected/declined reasons and advisory refs.
No strategy may execute commands during propose.
test_requirements: Tests for deterministic first success, fallback after decline, parse error to next strategy, all strategies exhausted to needs_review.
anti_patterns: Do not keep fallback behavior scattered across task_scoped_execution_service.
Do not retry endlessly inside orchestrator.

tasks.title: Refactor existing handler path into DeterministicHandlerStrategy
tasks.goal: Keep existing TaskHandlerRegistry but make it one strategy in the orchestrator instead of a special-case side path.
acceptance_criteria: DeterministicHandlerStrategy queries TaskHandlerRegistry for task_kind.
If no handler exists, returns declined with reason handler_not_found.
If handler returns None, returns declined with reason handler_declined.
If handler returns command/tool_calls, normalizes it into ExecutableProposal.
Invalid handler output returns failed/invalid_strategy_output and does not fall through as executable.
Existing DeterministicRepairHandler remains supported.
test_requirements: Tests for no handler, handler declined, valid handler proposal and invalid handler proposal.
anti_patterns: Do not remove registry; wrap it.
Do not trust handler output without normalization.

tasks.title: Implement TemplateProposeHandler as first deterministic strategy user
tasks.goal: Fix the immediate Fibonacci/new-project failure with a deterministic handler registered for coding and new_software_project.
acceptance_criteria: TemplateProposeHandler exists and implements propose/execute protocol.
Handler is registered for task_kind coding and new_software_project during Hub startup.
For Fibonacci/new-project task it returns command or tool_calls without calling sgpt, LM Studio or generate_text.
Handler uses tool_definitions_resolver/allowed_tools and does not emit unavailable tools where avoidable.
If write_file tool is available, handler may return write_file tool_calls.
If tool_calls execution is not reliable yet but bash is available, handler may return one deterministic shell command creating app.py, requirements.txt, README.md/tests.
Unsupported task_kind or unrecognized unsafe description returns None/declined, enabling fallback.
test_requirements: Unit tests for write_file tools, bash fallback, unknown task_kind and no LLM call.
anti_patterns: Do not make TemplateProposeHandler a catch-all LLM replacement.
Do not bypass safety/allowed_tools.

tasks.title: Implement WorkerStrategy for Hermes/OpenCode/native worker proposal
tasks.goal: Allow configured workers to propose executable steps through their adapters, governed by worker/runtime/context policy.
acceptance_criteria: WorkerStrategy uses WorkerRuntimeSelectionService to choose eligible worker/runtime for proposal mode.
Hermes/OpenCode/native worker can be enabled/disabled by ProposePolicy and worker selection policy.
Worker output must normalize to ExecutableProposal or advisory/declined; free text is not executable.
External/cloud workers are blocked if context policy disallows them.
If worker unavailable or disabled, strategy returns declined/failed without crashing.
test_requirements: Tests for disabled Hermes decline, OpenCode proposal normalization, native worker selection, cloud blocked.
anti_patterns: Do not call external workers before context policy check.
Do not treat worker summary text as command.

tasks.title: Implement ToolCallingLLMStrategy with real tools parameter
tasks.goal: Replace prompt-only tool descriptions with a first-class model API call that passes tool schemas when provider supports it.
acceptance_criteria: Strategy calls first-class LLM invocation service, not sgpt subprocess.
Tool definitions are passed as API tools/function schemas where provider supports tools.
Model tool_calls are normalized into ExecutableProposal.tool_calls.
If provider/model does not support tools, strategy declines with reason tools_not_supported rather than falling back internally to text parsing.
Malformed or text-only model output returns failed/advisory and orchestrator moves to next strategy according to policy.
No command/tool_calls means no executable proposal.
test_requirements: Mock provider tests for valid tool_calls, tools_not_supported, text-only response and malformed response.
anti_patterns: Do not write tools only to .ananta/tool-definitions.json and hope model reads them.
Do not call sgpt from this strategy.

tasks.title: Implement JsonSchemaLLMStrategy as fallback
tasks.goal: Use provider-supported response_format/json_schema when tool calling is unavailable, but keep it as a fallback strategy only.
acceptance_criteria: Strategy uses provider structured-output/json-schema feature when supported.
Output is validated against ExecutableProposal schema.
Provider without structured output support returns declined tools_or_schema_not_supported.
Invalid JSON/schema output returns failed parse_or_schema_error and does not retry-loop.
Valid schema output returns executable only if command/tool_calls exists.
test_requirements: Mock tests for valid schema, invalid schema, provider unsupported.
anti_patterns: Do not make JSON-schema LLM the only path.
Do not parse random Markdown as schema output.

tasks.title: Wrap sgpt fallback as disabled-by-default LegacySgptStrategy
tasks.goal: Keep old sgpt behavior only as explicit compatibility mode, never as silent default for executable proposal generation.
acceptance_criteria: LegacySgptStrategy is not in default strategy_order.
allow_legacy_sgpt=true is required before strategy can run.
Strategy records warning diagnostic legacy_sgpt_no_tools_schema.
If sgpt returns unstructured text, result is advisory/failed, not executable.
Existing _propose_single_task_step no longer calls sgpt directly outside strategy policy.
test_requirements: Tests prove sgpt is not called by default and is called only when explicitly enabled.
anti_patterns: Do not silently reintroduce sgpt fallback after orchestrator.

tasks.title: Make execute consume only normalized ExecutableProposal
tasks.goal: Execution should be fed by normalized last_proposal.command/tool_calls, never raw strategy output or free text.
acceptance_criteria: last_proposal persists ExecutableProposal or equivalent normalized payload.
POST /tasks/<tid>/step/execute without explicit command uses last_proposal only if it is executable.
Advisory/needs_review proposal cannot be executed.
command execution path and tool_calls execution path are both explicit; if tool_calls are not supported yet, proposal policy/handler must emit command until support exists.
Execution failure reason distinguishes no_executable_proposal from tool/runtime failure.
test_requirements: Tests for command proposal execution, tool_calls proposal handling/decline, advisory not executable.
anti_patterns: Do not pass raw LLM answer to execute.

tasks.title: Define and collect ArtifactManifest/FileChangeSet after execution
tasks.goal: Make file/artifact reality visible after execution so completion can be based on outputs, not model text.
acceptance_criteria: ArtifactManifest schema validates generated/modified/test artifacts with workspace-relative paths and hashes.
FileChangeSet captures created/modified/deleted files from before/after snapshot.
Collector reads worker-written manifest when present.
Collector can synthesize manifest from FileChangeSet when policy allows.
Path traversal, absolute paths and symlink escape are rejected or flagged violation.
Fibonacci project files app.py, requirements.txt, README.md/tests are represented as artifacts.
test_requirements: Manifest schema tests, workspace diff tests, path security tests, Fibonacci artifact collection test.
anti_patterns: Do not trust final chat text as evidence of generated files.
Do not trust worker manifest paths blindly.

tasks.title: Implement ArtifactCompletionPolicyService
tasks.goal: Centralize task finalization: completed/needs_review/retryable_failed/failed is decided from artifacts, manifest, diff, verification and expected outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Policy supports required_artifacts, required_paths, optional_paths, verification_required, allowed_synthesized_manifest, needs_review_conditions and retry_conditions.
Decision includes status, reason_codes, missing_artifacts, verification_refs and artifact_refs.
Valid required artifacts plus passed verification returns completed.
Missing required artifacts returns retryable_failed up to retry policy or failed/needs_review according to policy.
Malformed final model JSON is ignored/advisory when artifacts pass.
Final assistant text cannot mark a task completed.
test_requirements: Tests for completed, missing artifact, invalid manifest, verification failed, malformed chat output ignored.
anti_patterns: Do not scatter completion logic across multiple services.

tasks.title: Add retry-loop prevention and needs_review terminal path
tasks.goal: Malformed parse output or exhausted propose strategies must stop safely instead of retry-looping.
acceptance_criteria: Parser failures from optional/advisory strategies are not retryable when artifacts or deterministic fallback exist.
No executable proposal after all strategies returns needs_review or configured failure, not repeated autopilot_no_executable_step loop.
Retry counter increments only for retryable execution/artifact/verification failures.
Max retry guard is enforced.
State includes clear reason codes such as no_strategy_executable, advisory_parse_failed_ignored, missing_required_artifact, verification_failed.
test_requirements: Regression test reproducing original Fibonacci sgpt/free-text failure and proving no infinite retry.
anti_patterns: Do not requeue on every parser exception.

tasks.title: Expose propose strategy chain and artifact completion in API/CLI/UI
tasks.goal: Operators should see which strategy was tried/selected and why the task completed or needs review.
acceptance_criteria: Task detail API includes attempted_strategies, selected_strategy, proposal_status, proposal_reason and advisory_refs.
Task detail API includes artifact_summary, manifest_status, verification_status, completion_decision and reason_codes.
CLI shows selected strategy and produced artifact list/hash prefixes.
UI shows strategy chain result and artifact completion summary with warnings for legacy sgpt/advisory parse failure.
Raw secrets/full artifact contents are not displayed by default.
test_requirements: API serialization tests and frontend/CLI tests where available.
anti_patterns: Do not hide why sgpt was or was not used.

tasks.title: E2E: ananta new-project Fibonacci succeeds without sgpt propose path
tasks.goal: Prove the original problem is fixed: Fibonacci new-project generates executable proposal before sgpt and completes from artifacts/tests.
acceptance_criteria: Test submits new-project Fibonacci API goal.
Autoplanner creates tasks.
First coding/new_software_project task is handled by deterministic_handler strategy or configured first executable strategy.
run_sgpt_command is monkeypatched to raise if called, and flow still succeeds for supported task.
Propose response contains command/tool_calls and no autopilot_no_executable_step.
Execute creates app.py, requirements.txt and README.md/tests in workspace.
Project tests pass or verification policy returns completed.
No manual file creation or manual task status patch is required.
anti_patterns: Do not write E2E that only proves manual project files exist.

tasks.title: Make strategy configuration editable through project/blueprint config
tasks.goal: Allow controlled configuration of strategy order and fallbacks per project/blueprint role without code edits.
acceptance_criteria: BlueprintRoleDB.config or project config supports propose_policy reference/inline config.
Config roundtrip preserves strategy_order, allow_legacy_sgpt, requires_executable_step and task_kind_policies.
UI/API validation rejects unsafe configs such as allow_unstructured_text_as_execution=true unless explicit admin override exists.
Default policy is safe and works without UI configuration.
Bundle export/import preserves propose policy.
test_requirements: Config/API roundtrip tests and UI preservation tests where available.
anti_patterns: Do not make fallback behavior only hardcoded.
Do not let UI wipe advanced config fields.

tasks.title: Write architecture docs and update todo status
tasks.goal: Document the intended architecture clearly so future fixes do not reintroduce chat-JSON or ungoverned sgpt fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain original failure flow and root cause layers architecture/sgpt/LM Studio.
Docs explain ProposeStrategyOrchestrator strategy order and safe defaults.
Docs explain distinction between propose, execute and artifact-first completion.
Docs include Mermaid diagram for Task -> Orchestrator -> ExecutableProposal -> Execute -> ArtifactManifest -> Verify -> Complete.
Docs state legacy sgpt is disabled by default and compatibility only.
This todo JSON or a status companion file is updated after implementation slices.
anti_patterns: Do not document sgpt prompt JSON as recommended primary path.

definition_of_done_global: Strategy order and fallbacks are governed by ProposePolicy with legacy sgpt disabled by default.
TemplateProposeHandler fixes Fibonacci/new_project path without sgpt/LM Studio call.
ToolCallingLLMStrategy uses real tools parameter when available.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy and LegacySgptStrategy are explicit fallback strategies, not hidden default behavior.
Execute consumes only normalized ExecutableProposal with command/tool_calls.
ArtifactCompletionPolicy decides completed/needs_review/retryable_failed/failed from artifacts and verification.
Malformed LLM text/JSON cannot create infinite retry loops.
ananta new-project Fibonacci succeeds through Hub orchestration with sgpt propose path disabled/poisoned in test.
summary_notes: This v2 todo intentionally supersedes the narrow TemplateProposeHandler-only plan.
TemplateProposeHandler remains the fastest first implementation slice, but it is now framed as DeterministicHandlerStrategy inside the orchestrator.
The architecture has two halves: ProposeStrategyOrchestrator creates executable proposals; Artifact-First Completion proves whether execution really produced the expected result.
